// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import java.lang.foreign.*
import java.lang.foreign.ValueLayout.*
import java.lang.invoke.MethodHandle
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, NativeLoader, Scratch, Layouts, StructAbiCheck, UpcallBridge}

final class BlockingBindingsImpl extends BlockingBindings:
    import BlockingBindingsImpl.*

    def recv(fd: Int, buf: Buffer[Byte], len: Int)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): kyo.Fiber.Unsafe[Ffi.Outcome[Long], Any] =
        kyo.ffi.internal.BlockingBridge.run {
            val __kyoScratch$ = Scratch.currentFor("kyo.example.BlockingBindings", Scratch.configuredSize)
            val __kyoMark$ = __kyoScratch$.mark()
            try
                val bufSeg = kyo.ffi.internal.FfiUnsafe.expect[MemorySegment](buf.raw.asInstanceOf[AnyRef], classOf[MemorySegment], "MemorySegment on JVM", "kyo.example.BlockingBindings", "recv")
                val errnoSeg = __kyoScratch$.alloc(4L, 4L, "kyo.example.BlockingBindings", "recv")
                val retVal: Long = recvMH.invokeExact(errnoSeg, fd, bufSeg, len)
                val __errno = errnoSeg.get(JAVA_INT, 0L)
                val __kyoResult = retVal
                Ffi.Outcome.fromValueErrno(__kyoResult.toLong, __errno)
            finally __kyoScratch$.reset(__kyoMark$)
        }
end BlockingBindingsImpl

object BlockingBindingsImpl:
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.BlockingBindings")
    private val lib      = NativeLoader.load("kyo_blocking")
    private val linker   = Linker.nativeLinker()
    private val capture  = Linker.Option.captureCallState("errno")

    private val recvMH: MethodHandle = linker.downcallHandle(
        lib.find("recv").orElseThrow(),
        FunctionDescriptor.of(JAVA_LONG, JAVA_INT, ADDRESS, JAVA_INT),
        capture
    )
end BlockingBindingsImpl
